clEntries.8.1.1: v8.1.0: Fixed color control on RGB bulbs for multiple fingerprints, Fixed air quality CO2 reporting on air_quality_co2 driver, Fixed air purifier state reporting, Added soil sensor driver (_TZE284_0ints6wl / TS0601), New fingerprints for bulb_rgb, bulb_rgbw, bulb_rgb_led, bulb_dimmable, bulb_dimmable_dimmer, bulb_tunable_white, bulb_white
clEntries.8.1.0: New fingerprints for RGB bulbs, RGBW bulbs, air purifiers, and air quality sensors. Soil sensor driver added. Bug fixes for bulb color control and air quality reporting.
clEntries.7.5.53: v7.5.52: Fixed button_wireless_3 and button_wireless_4 driver issues (diagnostic Log 99ead539), Fixed ir_blaster device capability handling, Fixed soil_sensor measure_soil_moisture capability, Fixed plug_smart driver compose, Fixed switch driver issues
clEntries.7.5.52: Bug fixes for button_wireless_3/4, ir_blaster, soil_sensor, plug_smart and switch drivers. Fixed diagnostic issues Log 99ead539.
clEntries.7.5.51: Bug fix: resolved fingerprint collision for _TZ3000_h1ipgkwn. Improved USB dongle switch driver with flow cards and multi-endpoint support. Added new fingerprints.
clEntries.7.5.50: 166 new fingerprints added across 8 drivers. Fixed fingerprint collisions and removed incorrect matches. Generic DIY, PIR mmwave, SR_ZS_SWITCH, and valve_irrigation enriched.
clEntries.7.5.49: New driver: presence sensor microwave (pir_mmwave_sensor). New fingerprints via Phoenix Sovereign v8.1.0. SONOFF case variations in button_wireless. Power clamp meter watt tracking improved. Flow card cleanup per PR#120.
clEntries.7.5.48: Bug fix: clamp meter watt/voltage scaling corrected. New fingerprints added across multiple drivers. Flow repair tool integrated for device/flow replacement.
clEntries.7.5.46: v7.5.46 - Maintenance release. No new devices or fixes.
